productDisplayName: Vans Women Banyon Charcoal Casual Shoes
description: The vans Banyon for women - these surfsider flats reference the beachside surf community lifestyle. Fashioned for the surfer, but flattering on every woman, this low-top pair is as eco-conscious as it is chic with its water-based inks and hemp upper. Perfect for your weekend sun'n'sand getaway, this versatile pair looks great with checked shorts and a tee. Upper 100% recycled PET canvas and 100% hemp uppers with slip-on styling Frontal elastic for an easy slip-on Vanslite super-soft molded and contoured EVA sandal sock liner Team treated colorways and water-based inks and glues Central lacing on an elasticated band Logo flag on outside heel Padded tongue and collar for instep comfort Cut low at the ankle for style Midsole PU midsole for better shock absorption Outsole Waffle sole texture on the flexible vulcanized gum rubber outsole shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
